summary: Implemented US-068: Added spatial cube lattice wireframe system. Created generateCubeLattice() generator producing NxNxN grids with merged vertices ((N+1)^3) and deduplicated edges (3*N*(N+1)^2). Built cubeLatticeWireframe system reusing existing wireframe shaders for audio-reactive displacement (bass=macro warp, treble=vertex jitter). Added quality profile fields (latticeGridSize: 3/5/7, latticeCellSize: 1.2/1.0/0.8 per tier). Registered as single mode and pointcloud+cubelattice compound mode. All 1588 tests pass, build succeeds.
